summary: 3-Layer AI Safety Brain (Phase 45) - All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend Safety Brain dashboard verified with risk gauge, signal breakdown, 3-layer fused risk cards, predictive analysis with GPT-5.2 AI narrative, danger hotspots (43 zones), and recent safety events. SSE handler for predictive_safety_alert confirmed working.

GET /api/safety-brain/v2/fused-risk/{use.returns_three_layers: PASS - Returns fused_score, fused_level, layer1_realtime, layer2_location, layer3_behavior
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/fused-risk/{use.layer2_structure: PASS - score, weight=0.25, weighted, details with incident_density, night_time_risk
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/fused-risk/{use.layer3_structure: PASS - score, weight=0.25, weighted, skipped flag in fast mode
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/fused-risk/{use.full_behavior: PASS - Returns full behavior analysis when skip_behavior=false

GET /api/safety-brain/v2/location-risk/{.details_structure: PASS - includes incident_density, night_time_risk, recent_incident_boost, nearby_incidents, recent_incidents, hour, grid_cell

GET /api/safety-brain/v2/behavior/{user_.returns_analysis: PASS - Returns user_id, anomaly_score, confidence, stability, window_data
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/behavior/{user_.window_data_structure: PASS - Includes short (7d), medium (14d), long (30d) windows
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/behavior/{user_.patterns_and_recommendations: PASS - Returns patterns array and recommendations array

GET /api/safety-brain/v2/predictive/{use.returns_alert: PASS - Returns user_id, alert_level, anomaly_score, confidence, narrative, patterns, recommendations
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/predictive/{use.includes_location_risk: PASS - Returns location_risk with score when lat/lng provided

GET /api/safety-brain/v2/heatmap.returns_data: PASS - Returns heatmap array and count
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/heatmap.respects_limit: PASS - Limits results to specified amount
GET /api/safety-brain/v2/heatmap.point_structure: PASS - Points include lat, lng, intensity

frontend_ui.risk-gauge: PASS - Shows real-time risk score and level (NORMAL 3%)
frontend_ui.signal-breakdown-card: PASS - Shows all 5 signals (Fall, Voice, Route, Wander, Pickup) with weights
frontend_ui.three-layer-section: PASS - Shows all 3 layer cards with scores and details
frontend_ui.layer-1-card: PASS - Real-time signals (50% weight) with signal breakdown
frontend_ui.layer-2-card: PASS - Location intelligence (25% weight) with incident_density, time-of-day risk
frontend_ui.layer-3-card: PASS - Behavioral patterns (25% weight) - shows skipped in fast mode
frontend_ui.predictive-section: PASS - Section loads with placeholder when no analysis
frontend_ui.predictive-analysis-result: PASS - Shows anomaly score (77%), confidence (88%), stability (HIGH)
frontend_ui.detected-patterns: PASS - Shows patterns with severity badges (medium/high)
frontend_ui.ai-narrative: PASS - GPT-5.2 narrative displayed with toggle
frontend_ui.heatmap-data-card: PASS - Shows 43 danger hotspot zones with coordinates and intensity
frontend_ui.risk-levels-legend: PASS - Shows Normal, Suspicious, Dangerous, Critical ranges
frontend_ui.safety-events-list: PASS - Shows 20 recent events with risk scores and signals

sse_handlers.predictive_safety_alert: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (line 1429), setPredictiveAlert called

critical_code_review_comments: 3-Layer fusion correctly implements: Layer 1 (50%) + Layer 2 (25%) + Layer 3 (25%)
Voice distress override rule correctly implemented: if voice > 0.3, floor at 80%
Behavioral analyzer correctly analyzes 3 time windows: 7d (short), 14d (medium), 30d (long)
Location intelligence uses 100m grid cells with incident_density, night_time_risk, recent_incident_boost
Predictive alerts use GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key for AI narrative generation
SSE broadcasts predictive_safety_alert to user and operators for medium/high alerts
Frontend correctly receives predictiveAlert prop via SSE and updates state
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing safety events and test user data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-Layer AI Safety Brain fully tested. Backend: v2/fused-risk (3-layer fusion), v2/location-risk (grid-based danger scoring), v2/behavior (7/14/30 day pattern analysis), v2/predictive (GPT-5.2 AI narrative), v2/heatmap (danger zones). V1 endpoints still work: status/{user_id}, events, evaluate. Frontend: SafetyBrainDashboard shows risk gauge, signal breakdown, 3-layer cards, predictive analysis section with AI narrative, danger hotspots, safety events list. SSE handler predictive_safety_alert in FamilyDashboard passes predictiveAlert prop to SafetyBrainDashboard. GPT-5.2 call takes 5-10 seconds. Test coords: lat=28.6139&lng=77.2090 (Delhi).

verified_features.fused_risk_endpoint: Working - Returns 3-layer fused score with layer details
verified_features.location_risk_endpoint: Working - Returns location danger score with incident_density, night_time_risk
verified_features.behavior_endpoint: Working - Returns anomaly_score, confidence, stability, window_data, patterns, recommendations
verified_features.predictive_endpoint: Working - Returns AI narrative via GPT-5.2, alert_level, patterns
verified_features.heatmap_endpoint: Working - Returns danger hotspot data points
verified_features.frontend_dashboard: Working - All UI elements render correctly
verified_features.frontend_predictive_button: Working - Triggers API call and displays results
verified_features.frontend_ai_narrative: Working - GPT-5.2 narrative displayed with toggle
verified_features.sse_predictive_alert: Working - SSE event received and state updated
